tagline: Turn scattered moments into made ideas.

designSystem.style: Dark-first creative workspace with deep purple/violet brand identity. Premium atmospheric dark theme with vivid accent pops. Clean card-based layout with subtle glow effects and smooth transitions. Supports full light mode with lavender-tinted surfaces.

screens: Catch — Fragment capture hub with quick-capture strip (Text/Voice/Photo/Sound) and chronological fragment feed
Weave — Pattern Weave AI cluster view showing grouped fragments by mood, theme, and emotional tone with expandable cards
Forge — Prompt Forge engine with cluster selector, output type tabs (Story Seed / Campaign Brief / Design Brief / Concept Prompt), and Remix Export grid
Board — Living Moodboard with auto-assembled photo grids, extracted color palettes, and source fragment citations
Settings — Theme toggle (dark/light), user stats, notification preferences, and auto-grouping controls
